achievements.subtitle: Substrate Awakens · 2026-06-20
achievements.description: Awarded to replicators who contributed heartbeat-attested benchmark results during the first live Substrate Awakens cooperative mesh event.
achievements.trigger: replicator heartbeat-attested result stream appears in event dashboard with ≥1 verified-correct answer
achievements.founding_replicator_basis: arrival order — slot number assigned on first verified result
notes: Founding Replicator status: first 100 to contribute (slot # in arrival order)
Crow Feather is non-transferable and permanently tied to email + node_id
Marks credit applied to account within 24h of event close
Truth-Always: Andon-Cord quarantines do NOT prevent award if ≥1 correct before quarantine
